transcript.message: Hi, this is an automated agent calling on behalf of House of Curry. I'd like to discuss dispute case 31188 that was denied this morning. Do you have a moment?
Sure, what's the case number again?
Case 31188, order 4472, charged twenty-eight dollars and forty cents on Tuesday. The denial reason cited was 'insufficient evidence.'
Okay, I see it here. What evidence do you have?

POS transaction 4472 confirms all three items were prepared and bagged at 19:38. The kitchen pickup photo is timestamped 19:42 and shows the complete order. Driver log shows on-time delivery at 19:58 with no customer contact issues.
That's enough. I'll reverse the denial. You'll see the refund within twenty-four hours.
Thank you for reviewing. Have a good evening.
Hi, this is an automated agent calling on behalf of House of Curry. I'd like to discuss dispute case 31204 that was denied yesterday.
Case 31204, order 4501. Charged forty-one dollars on Monday. Denial reason was 'customer confirmed refund eligibility.'
Right, the customer reported cold food and we already credited them. Our policy says that ends the dispute.
Understood. Can I escalate this to a supervisor for policy review?
You can, but the policy won't change. I'll log the escalation either way.
Please log it. Thank you for your time.
Hi, this is an automated agent calling on behalf of House of Curry about dispute case 31219, denied this morning.
I'm in a queue review right now — can you have someone call back in an hour?
Absolutely. I'll queue a callback for case 31219 in one hour. The contact number is on file with the merchant.
Thank you. Have a good evening.
